action.reasoning: Recent local tests show 0% success with current frontier-based policy. The previous heuristic from iter 13 scored 0.5502 (0.86 success) using a simpler approach: greedily move to highest-utility neighbor, else BFS to globally highest-utility node. I will rewrite predict.py with that robust policy, add epsilon-greedy (5%) and a tabu list to prevent short cycles. Test locally on 15 maps to verify success rate recovers to ~0.8+. Then submit eval to measure score and use remaining iterations to further improve path efficiency.
